title: DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
organization: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE)
short_info: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website drdo.gov.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 27 years of age who are pursuing final year Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering and Science from a recognized Indian University/Institute are eligible to apply for these Paid Internship vacancies. The application process for DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 June 2026. Cand

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Below 28 Years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing final year Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering and Science, full time Course in the respective discipline from a recognized Indian University/Institute
qualification.details: Computer Science Engineering/Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Engineering: Pursuing final year B.Tech/M.Tech in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute. Chemical Engineering/Polymer Science & Technology/Materials Science Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Textile Engineering: Pursuing final year B.Tech/M.Tech in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute. Chemistry/Material Science/Textile: Pursuing final year M.Sc. in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Computer Science Engineering/Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Engineering
Chemical Engineering/Polymer Science & Technology/Materials Science Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Textile Engineering

selection_process: CGPA/Online interview/Interaction Merit basis Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMSRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
